name: After Prisma Schema Change
description: Reminds to run migration and regenerate Prisma client after schema.prisma is edited

then.prompt: The Prisma schema was just edited. Please remind the user to: 1) Run `npx prisma migrate dev --name <description>` to create a migration, 2) Run `npx prisma generate` to regenerate the client, 3) Restart the backend container if running in Docker. Check if there are any new models or fields that need corresponding DTOs or service updates.
